## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused solution.

## Verification

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest -vv`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, paid provider output, or unsafe logs are included
- [ ] Database changes include a reversible Alembic migration
- [ ] UI changes remain English, responsive, keyboard accessible, and CSP compatible

## Screenshots

Add sanitized screenshots for visual changes, or write “Not applicable.”
